_meta.dna: gmail(app) = install(easy) x auth(google) x extract(inbox) x preview(actions) x approve(human) x execute(safe) x evidence(sealed)
_meta.question_expansion_instruction: Each floor has 7 seed questions from a specific persona context. Questions must be answerable by checking if something actually works — click it, see it, verify it. Not theoretical.

name: Tower of Gmail Inbox Triage
protocol: FORECAST -> CROSS-REF -> AUDIT(7q) -> FIX -> VERIFY -> SEAL -> POSTMORTEM

floors.persona_context: 34, Portland, Freelance copywriter, Intermediate tech, Free tier, has never used Solace before, wants to try Gmail triage app first
questions: Can I find the Gmail Inbox Triage app in the Solace Browser App Store by searching 'gmail' or browsing the email category?
Does the app detail page show a clear description of what Gmail Inbox Triage does before I click Install?
Can I click 'Install' on the Gmail Inbox Triage app and see it added to my installed apps list within 5 seconds?
After installation, does the app appear in my sidebar or dashboard with a recognizable Gmail icon?
Does the install process complete without requiring me to use a terminal, run pip, or edit any config file?
If I click 'Install' while not logged in, does the app prompt me to sign in first rather than silently failing?
Can I see the app's required permissions (email read, email send) listed before I confirm the install?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Dana is a first-time Solace user. Every question must verify she can discover, understand, and install the Gmail app without technical knowledge. 'It is possible if you configure X' is a FAIL.

floors.persona_context: 41, Mumbai, Small business owner with Google Workspace, Beginner tech, Pro tier, has 3 email accounts, worried about security
questions: After installing the Gmail Triage app, does it prompt me to connect my Google account with a 'Sign in with Google' button?
Does the Google OAuth consent screen clearly show which permissions Solace is requesting (read-only email access)?
After I approve Google access, does the app show a confirmation that my account raj@mehta-exports.com is connected?
Can I connect a second Google account (raj.personal@gmail.com) without disconnecting the first one?
If I deny the Google OAuth permission, does the app show a clear error message explaining why it needs access?
Is my Google OAuth token stored locally in the encrypted vault and NOT sent to Solace's cloud servers?
Can I revoke the Google connection from within the app and see it reflected immediately in my Google account's third-party access list?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Raj is security-conscious and has multiple Google accounts. Every question must verify the OAuth flow works correctly, handles edge cases, and respects token storage policies.

floors.persona_context: 29, Stockholm, Marketing manager, Intermediate tech, Starter tier, receives 150+ emails/day, inbox is overwhelming
questions: After connecting my Google account, can I click 'Scan Inbox' and see my latest 50 emails loaded within 10 seconds?
Does the inbox extraction show sender name, subject line, date, and a snippet for each email in a scannable list?
Can I filter the extracted emails by category (promotions, updates, social, primary) before triaging?
Does the app correctly identify and group email threads rather than showing each reply as a separate item?
If I have unread emails in Swedish, does the app display their subject lines and snippets without garbling Unicode characters?
Can I see a count of total unread emails vs total extracted so I know the scan covered my full inbox?
Does the extraction skip emails already triaged in a previous session so I am not re-processing old messages?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Lisa has a high-volume inbox. Questions verify extraction actually pulls real emails, displays them correctly, handles non-ASCII content, and provides useful filtering.

floors.persona_context: 52, Mexico City, Real estate agent, Beginner tech, Pro tier, gets client inquiries via email, needs to respond quickly
questions: After inbox scan, does the app suggest specific actions for each email (reply, archive, label, forward) with a preview of what it will do?
Can I see the full draft reply text the app generated before it sends anything to my client?
Does the preview clearly distinguish between 'will archive' and 'will delete' so I do not accidentally lose a client email?
If the app suggests replying to a property inquiry, does the draft include the correct client name and property address from the original email?
Can I edit the suggested reply text in the preview before approving it?
Does the preview show me the estimated cost (LLM tokens) for generating each suggested action?
If I click 'Skip' on a suggested action, does it move to the next email without taking any action on the skipped one?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Carlos is not tech-savvy and handles high-stakes client communication. Every preview must show EXACTLY what will happen. Vague descriptions like 'an email will be sent' are FAIL.

floors.persona_context: 38, Riyadh, HR Director, Intermediate tech, Enterprise tier, handles sensitive employee communications, requires approval for every action
questions: Does every suggested action (reply, forward, archive) require my explicit approval before executing — no auto-send?
Can I approve multiple low-risk actions (archive promotions) in batch while reviewing sensitive replies one-by-one?
Does the approval modal show me the full email content and the full proposed action side-by-side?
If I reject a suggested reply, can I provide feedback on why so the next suggestion is better?
Is there a 'Reject All' button that cancels all pending actions if I realize the suggestions are wrong?
Does the approval flow work correctly in RTL layout for my Arabic locale without overlapping text?
After I approve an action, is there a 3-second undo window before the action actually executes?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Fatima handles sensitive HR emails. The approval gate is her safety net. Every question verifies that NOTHING executes without explicit human consent and that the UI works in RTL.

floors.persona_context: 45, Lagos, Compliance officer at fintech startup, Expert tech, Enterprise tier, needs audit trail for every email action taken
questions: After I approve a reply action, does the app send the email through Gmail's API and show a 'Sent' confirmation with timestamp?
Is each executed action recorded in an evidence bundle with SHA-256 hash, timestamp, action type, and my user ID?
Can I view the evidence chain for all actions taken in today's triage session in a single evidence log?
Does the evidence record include the original email content AND the reply content so I can prove what was sent?
If the Gmail API returns an error (rate limit, network failure), does the app show the specific error instead of silently failing?
Can I export the evidence chain for a specific date range as a JSON file for our compliance audit?
Does the evidence hash chain maintain integrity — if I tamper with one record, does verification of the chain fail?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: James needs proof of every action for regulatory compliance. Evidence must be real, hash-chained, exportable, and tamper-evident. Silent failures or missing evidence = compliance violation.

floors.persona_context: 33, Vancouver, Product manager, Expert tech, Pro tier, triages email across morning laptop and evening tablet sessions
questions: If I triage 30 emails in the morning and close the browser, does my evening session remember which emails were already processed?
Does the app persist my Google account connection across browser restarts without requiring re-authentication?
If I processed emails on my laptop, can I open Solace Browser on my tablet and see the same triage history?
Does the app save my custom filters (skip promotions, prioritize clients) between sessions?
If the browser crashes mid-triage, does the app resume from the last completed action rather than starting over?
Can I see a history of all past triage sessions with date, email count processed, and actions taken?
Does the session state sync to my local storage only (not cloud) if I am on the Free tier without cloud sync?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Sophie works across multiple devices and sessions. Every question verifies that state persists correctly, syncs where appropriate, and handles crashes gracefully.
